title: bidens fennica
intro: Bidens fennica, also known as Fenno Bidens or Fenno Beggarticks, is a perennial plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is said to have health benefits such as soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems. Bidens fennica can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, which can be used to make topical applications for skin conditions and wounds.
